title: fix: harden network-disabled youtube transport
goal: Harden network-disabled YouTube Live Chat direct REST fake transport lifecycle and align fake execution mode across planner, config, and kill switch contracts.

risks.risk: Credential handle release is skipped on a safe failure path.
risks.mitigation: Focused tests cover success, HTTP error, redirect, content type, oversized body, invalid JSON, projection failure, fetch exception, acquisition failure, and release failure.

risks.risk: Fake transport path accidentally authorizes real network execution.
risks.mitigation: Planner requires fake kill switch and network_authorized false; transport uses injected fetch only and records network_call_used false.

risks.risk: Raw API response metadata or unsafe error text is exposed.
risks.mitigation: Safe projection retains only items, nextPageToken, and pollingIntervalMillis; tests reject raw error reflection and root metadata exposure.
